purpose: Standalone new-round architecture dataset containing only the 50 NCARB-derived tasks.
dataset_characterization: NCARB practice-theme-derived, paraphrased, parameterized, and manually checked architecture-code semantic extension; not 50 fully independent real project cases.
source_visibility_policy: Algorithm-visible files remove exact NCARB question numbers, source file names, answer options, and internal expanded_from_ARCH_FKG clone lineage.
scenario_variant_policy: Repeated rule-structure groups are retained only as parameterized variants with substantive differences in scenario facts, variable bounds, objective weights, applicability conditions, or document context.

scenario_variant_groups.difference_policy: Each task in the group has at least one substantive difference in scenario facts, variable bounds, objective weights, applicability/document context, or review phase.
scenario_variant_groups.independence_note: These are not claimed as fully independent real project cases.

scenario_variant_groups.difference_policy: Each task in the group has at least one substantive difference in scenario facts, variable bounds, objective weights, applicability/document context, or review phase.
scenario_variant_groups.independence_note: These are not claimed as fully independent real project cases.

semantic_indicator_policy: Semantic-indicator tasks primarily test textual, categorical, system-capability, applicability, or precedence recovery; they should not be described as continuous numeric optimization cases.
nonlinear_constraint_policy: Tasks using max(), min(), abs(), symbolic division by decision variables, or variable products require a nonlinear/auxiliary-function constraint checker or an explicit linearized surrogate before pure linear optimization.
method_visible_input_policy: Methods may read only core/algorithm_inputs, core/scenario_models, rule_libraries, public_tasks, and public-only compatibility tasks. Hidden references are not method inputs.
last_repair_scope: Differentiated ARCH_FKG_55 and ARCH_FKG_95, preserving public/hidden input separation and alignment summaries.
